collectionProcessors.name: Completed_Approved_Submitted_Phase_Baselines
collectionProcessors.label: Completed, Approved & Submitted Phase Baselines
collectionProcessors.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (1 AND 3 AND 5) OR (1 AND 3 AND 4)
